title: Method overrides should not change parameter defaults
description: Default arguments are determined by the static type of the object. public virtual void Run(int distance = 42) { /* ... */ } public override void Run(int distance = 5) { /* ..
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

never_trigger_on: Explicit interface implementations: interface method defaults
Override methods that keep the SAME default value as the base class
logic.reasoning: This rule uses a custom function that performs semantic analysis to detect override methods that CHANGE default parameter values from the base implementation. Unlike a simple regex approach, this function: 1) Parses class hierarchy to find base classes and their virtual/abstract methods with defaults. 2) Finds override methods with default parameters. 3) Compares the actual default values - only flags violations when values are DIFFERENT. 4) Properly handles inheritance chains. 5) Excludes test classes and methods with Assert calls. This prevents false positives when an override specifies the SAME default value as the base class.
